facebook.caption: Tourists keep walking past this. Guan Di Temple on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is one of the most atmospheric spots on the island and barely anyone stops. Red lanterns, incense smoke, a courtyard that actually makes you slow down. No ticket booth. No tour bus. Just a genuine piece of local Phu Quoc life most visitors never see. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Red lanterns swaying, incense rising, zero crowds. Guan Di Temple sits right off Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and most tourists walk straight past it. Don't. This is what Phu Quoc looks like when you leave the beach strip behind.

instagram.caption: Locals don't post about Guan Di Temple. Red lanterns, incense, zero crowds. One of the realest spots on the island. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Incense smoke and red lanterns off Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Guan Di Temple hits different when the beach crowds stay away.

tiktok.caption: What the beach crowd never finds in Phu Quoc. Guan Di Temple, no queue, no ticket. #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #TravelTips

scenes: Pan up red lanterns at entrance
video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
